# TestTubes

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TestTubes;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TestTubes { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

tubes, vials, phials, flasks, ampoules, ampules, lab, chemistry, experiment, test
